case_title: OPPENHEIMER & CO. INC., A CORPORATION VS. DONALD J MCBIRNEY

docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER OPPENHEIMER & CO. INC., A CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER OPPENHEIMER & CO. INC., A CORPORATION'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 19, 2014 PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT BY WAY OF E-MAIL SENT TO THE COURT. MR. ALBERT WAS NOTIFIED BY THE CLERK AND WILL GIVE NOTICE TO THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE: JOHN STEWART; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976

Off Calendar Aug-19-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER OPPENHEIMER & CO. INCORPORATED'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. (Principal - $14,493.90; Interest 9% per annum from 8/10/12; Costs-$1,475.00) ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest J. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Jul-31-2014 Continued To Aug-19-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
PETITIONER OPPENHEIMER & CO. INC., A CORPORATION's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to August 19, 2014 per request of the Defendant by way of e-mail sent to the court. Mr. Albert was notified by the clerk and will give notice to the Defendant. Judge: John Stewart; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
=(302/JKS)
